welcome_offer.description: $100 or greater Amazon gift card or statement credit upon approval.
notes: U.S. Bank's Amazon Business cards page shows the Prime Business Card welcome offer as an approval bonus rather than a spend-triggered bonus.
Keep this as adaptor-only until a production card JSON is created.

caveats: This adapter targets the Prime Business Card variant (Prime member 5% back).

welcome_offer: sources/*issuer*.md:$100 or greater Amazon gift card

open_questions: Confirm whether U.S. Bank later adds a spend requirement or changes the approval bonus language.

community.summary: Track the new U.S. Bank Prime Business Card launch page and its approval bonus.

observations.source: U.S. Bank Amazon Business cards page
observations.regex: Prime Business Card|\$100 or greater Amazon gift card|statement credit
observations.excerpt: Official page shows a non-spend approval bonus for the Prime Business Card.
